title: Spectral Mod [Basic]
description: Add new ore to The Nether. Spawns in Blackstone. New Equipment, tools, items and blocks.
body:
1. Add new ore to The Nether. Spawns in Blackstone.
2. New Armor (Spectral Armor).
3. New Weapons: Spectral Sword and Spectral Axe.
4. New Tools: Spectral Shovel, Spectral Pickaxe, Spectral Hoe.
5. New Blocks: Spectral Ore, Block of Spectral (can be crafted from spectral), Spectral Block (can be crafted from spectral ingots)
6. New Items: Spectral (Mineral), Spectral Ingots.

*Weapon can set target on fire when you hit it. (Sword and Axe)
*New Blocks can be mined with a diamond pickaxe.
*Spectral Ingot can be crafted from 4 spectral, 1 gold ingot and 1 netherite scrap.
*The amount of dropped Ore can be increased using the Fortune Enchantment.
